# cloudflare_ai_gateways (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_ai_gateways" "example_ai_gateways" {
  account_id = "3ebbcb006d4d46d7bb6a8c7f14676cb0"
  search = "search"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)

### Optional

- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000
- `search` (String) Search by id

### Read-Only

- `result` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `authentication` (Boolean)
- `cache_invalidate_on_update` (Boolean)
- `cache_ttl` (Number)
- `collect_logs` (Boolean)
- `created_at` (String)
- `dlp` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--dlp))
- `id` (String) gateway id
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `log_management` (Number)
- `log_management_strategy` (String) Available values: "STOP_INSERTING", "DELETE_OLDEST".
- `logpush` (Boolean)
- `logpush_public_key` (String)
- `modified_at` (String)
- `otel` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--otel))
- `rate_limiting_interval` (Number)
- `rate_limiting_limit` (Number)
- `rate_limiting_technique` (String) Available values: "fixed", "sliding".
- `retry_backoff` (String) Backoff strategy for retry delays
Available values: "constant", "linear", "exponential".
- `retry_delay` (Number) Delay between retry attempts in milliseconds (0-5000)
- `retry_max_attempts` (Number) Maximum number of retry attempts for failed requests (1-5)
- `store_id` (String)
- `stripe` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--stripe))
- `workers_ai_billing_mode` (String) Controls how Workers AI inference calls routed through this gateway are billed. Only 'postpaid' is currently supported.
Available values: "postpaid".
- `zdr` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--result--dlp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.dlp`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) Available values: "BLOCK", "FLAG".
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `policies` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--dlp--policies))
- `profiles` (List of String)

<a id="nestedatt--result--dlp--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.dlp.policies`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) Available values: "FLAG", "BLOCK".
- `check` (List of String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String)
- `profiles` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--result--otel"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.otel`

Read-Only:

- `authorization` (String)
- `content_type` (String) Available values: "json", "protobuf".
- `headers` (Map of String)
- `url` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--result--stripe"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.stripe`

Read-Only:

- `authorization` (String)
- `usage_events` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result--stripe--usage_events))

<a id="nestedatt--result--stripe--usage_events"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.stripe.usage_events`

Read-Only:

- `payload` (String)
